* THICKNESS OVER SIZE.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 1. Wrong PO / Incomplete Details in PO Issued to supplier.
* THICKNESS OVER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 1. Verification by Sign. Authority of PO with Purchase indent and before issue to supplier.
* THICKNESS OVER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 1. MATERIAL CROSS VERIFY BY QA INSPECTOR BEFORE ENTERING THE PLANT AGAINST MTC & INVOICE.

* THICKNESS OVER SIZE.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 2. Wrong PO / Incomplete Details in PO Issued to supplier.
* THICKNESS OVER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 2. Mill TC should be verified by field inspector.

* THICKNESS OVER SIZE.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 3. No verification of TC by QA inspector.
* THICKNESS OVER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 3. Third party material test Plan to be adhered.
* THICKNESS OVER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 3. Verification of Mill TC material by MRN and third party test Report.

* THICKNESS OVER SIZE.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 4. NON CALIBRATED INSTRUMENT USE FOR INSPECTION
* THICKNESS OVER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 4. Instrument calibration plan to be adhered.
* THICKNESS OVER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 4. Calibrated instrument should be used to check the material.

* THICKNESS UNDER SIZE.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 1. Wrong PO / Incomplete Details in PO Issued to supplier.
* THICKNESS UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 1. Verification by Sign. Authority of PO with Purchase indent and before issue to supplier.
* THICKNESS UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 1. MATERIAL CROSS VERIFY BY QA INSPECTOR BEFORE ENTERING THE PLANT AGAINST MTC & INVOICE.
2. Mill TC should be verified by field inspector.

* THICKNESS UNDER SIZE.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 3. No verification of TC by QA inspector.
* THICKNESS UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 3. Third party material test Plan to be adhered.
* THICKNESS UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 3. Verification of Mill TC material by MRN and third party test Report.

* THICKNESS UNDER SIZE.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 4. NON CALIBRATED INSTRUMENT USE FOR INSPECTION
* THICKNESS UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 4. Instrument calibration plan to be adhered.
* THICKNESS UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 4. Calibrated instrument should be used to check the material.

* PLATE RUSTY.Current Controls Prevention: 1. Material Stored in covered area. Awareness about it to Quality inspector.
* PLATE RUSTY.Current Controls Detection: 1. Incoming Inspection Report. Before next process operator will ensure that Plate is free from RUST.
2. Color coding to be done on the steel plates. Green, Yellow.

* SHEET BEND.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 1. Plate may be hit / damage during unloading.
2. Plate may not be stored properly
* SHEET BEND.Current Controls Prevention: 2. STORAGE LOCATION DEFINED FOR RAW MATERIAL
* SHEET BEND.Current Controls Detection: 2. Before next process start operator should ensure that Plate is not bend / Inprocess inspection Report.

* MATERIAL GRADE WRONG.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 1. Wrong PO / Incomplete Details in PO Issued to supplier.
* MATERIAL GRADE WRONG.Current Controls Prevention: 1. Verification by Sign. Authority of PO with Purchase indent and before issue to supplier.
2. Verification of TC by Field inspector.

* MATERIAL GRADE WRONG.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 3. Chemical and Physical properties not matched with std
* MATERIAL GRADE WRONG.Current Controls Prevention: 3. Chemical and Physical properties be checked & matched with std.
* MATERIAL GRADE WRONG.Current Controls Detection: 3. Third party test to be done as per plan.

* STORAGE ON WRONG LOCATION / MIX-UP.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 1. No proper place for storage of material by grade and thickness.
* STORAGE ON WRONG LOCATION / MIX-UP.Current Controls Prevention: 1. Storage area is Identified as per grade and thickness wise.
* STORAGE ON WRONG LOCATION / MIX-UP.Current Controls Detection: 1. WI Displayed near Raw material Storage area and Incoming Inspector Gives colour code after Inspection.
2. Operator will use the material as per the color coding / FIFO system.

TAPPER CUTTING.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 1. M/c parameter may not be set as per std.
TAPPER CUTTING.Current Controls Prevention: 1. M/c process parameter are to be set as per std. before process starts
TAPPER CUTTING.Current Controls Detection: 1. Inprocess Inspection Report with Full Size Template.  2. Daily Process parameter check sheet.

TAPPER CUTTING.Current Controls Prevention: 2. Bed cleaning to be done as per decided frequency.
TAPPER CUTTING.Current Controls Detection: 2. Bed cleaning date to be mention on bed.

* PROFILE OVER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 1. Verification of nesting of machine before process starts.
* PROFILE OVER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 1. 1st set up Inspection of part with Full Size Template.

* PROFILE OVER SIZE.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 2. Process parameter of m/c is not ok as per Std.
* PROFILE OVER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 2. Reset process parameter of plasma m/c
* PROFILE OVER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 2. Inprocess Inspection Report with Full Size Template.

* PROFILE UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 1. Verification of nesting of machine before process starts
* PROFILE UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 1. 1st set up Inspection of part with Full Size Template.

* PROFILE UNDER SIZE.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 2. Process parameter of m/c is not ok as per Std.
* PROFILE UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 2. Reset process parameter of plasma m/c
* PROFILE UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 2. Inprocess Inspection Report with Full Size Template.

* UNEVEN CUTTING / SLAG.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: Process parameter of m/c is not ok as per Std.
* UNEVEN CUTTING / SLAG.Current Controls Prevention: Reset process parameter of plasma m/c
* UNEVEN CUTTING / SLAG.Current Controls Detection: 1. 1st set up Inspection of part  2. Inprocess Inspection Report with Full Size Template

TAPPER CUTTING.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 1. M/c parameter may not be set as per std.
TAPPER CUTTING.Current Controls Prevention: 1. M/c process parameter are to be set as per std. before process starts
TAPPER CUTTING.Current Controls Detection: 1. Inprocess Inspection Report with Full Size Template.  2. Daily Process parameter check sheet.

TAPPER CUTTING.Current Controls Prevention: 2. Bed cleaning to be done as per decided frequency.
TAPPER CUTTING.Current Controls Detection: 2. Bed cleaning date to be mention on bed.

* PROFILE OVER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 1. Verification of nesting of machine before process starts.
* PROFILE OVER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 1. 1st set up Inspection of part with Full Size Template.

* PROFILE OVER SIZE.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 2. Process parameter of m/c is not ok as per Std.
* PROFILE OVER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 2. Reset process parameter of plasma m/c
* PROFILE OVER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 2. Inprocess Inspection Report with Full Size Template.

* PROFILE UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 1. Verification of nesting of machine before process starts
* PROFILE UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 1. 1st set up Inspection of part with Full Size Template.

* PROFILE UNDER SIZE.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 2. Process parameter of m/c is not ok as per Std.
* PROFILE UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: 2. Reset process parameter of plasma m/c
* PROFILE UNDER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: 2. Inprocess Inspection Report with Full Size Template.

* UNEVEN CUTTING / SLAG.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: Process parameter of m/c is not ok as per Std.
* UNEVEN CUTTING / SLAG.Current Controls Prevention: Reset process parameter of plasma m/c
* UNEVEN CUTTING / SLAG.Current Controls Detection: 1. 1st set up Inspection of part  2. Inprocess Inspection Report with Full Size Template

DRILL UNDER OR OVER SIZE.Current Controls Prevention: DRILL SIZE TO BE CHECK BEFORE USE
DRILL UNDER OR OVER SIZE.Current Controls Detection: DIMENSIONS ARE CHECKED BY OPERATOR AFTER COMPLETING OPERATION.

TAPPING THREAD DEPTH MAY NOT BE CORRECT.Potential Failure mode: TAPPING THREAD DEPTH MAY NOT BE CORRECT
TAPPING THREAD DEPTH MAY NOT BE CORRECT.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: ALL 03 TAP NOT RUN IN TAPPING HOLE.
TAPPING THREAD DEPTH MAY NOT BE CORRECT.Current Controls Prevention: TAPPING HOLE TO BE CHECK AFTER OPERATION COMPLETE. THROUGH GO NO GO GAUGE
TAPPING THREAD DEPTH MAY NOT BE CORRECT.Current Controls Detection: TAPPING HOLE CHECKED BY GO NO GO GAUGE.

Less Chamfer.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 1. Wrong drill tool selected  2. Untrained operator

Chamfer Over Size.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 1. Wrong drill tool selected  2. Untrained operator

PART DAMAGE.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: OTHER MATERIAL FROM PART LIKE CHIPS, CUTTING SLUG.

BOW.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 1. WRONG METHOD USE FOR STRAIGHTENING  2. OPERATOR NEGLIGENCY
BOW.Current Controls Prevention: ONLY TRAINED OPERATOR DONE THE PROCESS
BOW.Current Controls Detection: INPROCESS INSPECTION. SKILL MATRIX FOR OPERATOR ADHERE AS PER PLAN

ANGLE NOT OK.Current Controls Prevention: 1. APPROPRIATE PRESSURE APPLY  2. PRESSURE GAUGE SHOULD WORK PROPERLY.
ANGLE NOT OK.Current Controls Detection: 1. PRESSURE SHOULD BE APPLIED AS PER WORK INSTRUCTION.  2. PRESSURE GAUGE SHOULD BE CALIBRATED AS PER PLAN.

ANGLE NOT OK.Current Controls Prevention: 1. APPROPRIATE PRESSURE APPLY  2. PRESSURE GAUGE SHOULD WORK PROPERLY.
ANGLE NOT OK.Current Controls Detection: 1. PRESSURE SHOULD BE APPLIED AS PER WORK INSTRUCTION.  2. PRESSURE GAUGE SHOULD BE CALIBRATED AS PER PLAN.

BEND HEIGHT IS NOT OK.Current Controls Prevention: APPROPRIATE PRESSURE APPLY ON THE PART AS PER WORK INSTRUCTION.
BEND HEIGHT IS NOT OK.Current Controls Detection: 1. SET UP INSPECTION OF PART  2. INPROCESS INSPECTION WITH BEND GAUGE

TOOL MARK.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 1. DIE & PUNCH WEAR OUT  2. ROUGH SURFACE OF TOOL
TOOL MARK.Current Controls Prevention: 1. PREVENTIVE MAINTENANCE OF TOOL AS PER PLAN.
TOOL MARK.Current Controls Detection: 1. 1ST SET UP INSPECTION OF PART  2. 100% VISUAL INSPECTION BY OPERATOR

* MATERIAL CRACK.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 1. PROPERTIES OF PLATE MAY BE NOT AS PER STD.  2. PLATE MAY BE LAMINATED.
* MATERIAL CRACK.Current Controls Prevention: 1. PLATE COMPOSITION VERIFY DURING INCOMING INSPECTION  2. 3RD PARTY PLATE TESTING AS PER PLAN

* STORAGE ON WRONG LOCATION / MIX-UP.Potential Cause(s) of Failure: 1. No proper place for storage of material by grade and thickness.
* STORAGE ON WRONG LOCATION / MIX-UP.Current Controls Prevention: 1. Storage area is Identified as per grade and thickness wise.
* STORAGE ON WRONG LOCATION / MIX-UP.Current Controls Detection: 1. WI Displayed near Raw material Storage area and Incoming Inspector Gives colour code after Inspection.
2. Operator will use the material as per the color coding / FIFO system.
